value.found_quote:
## Delegation Hierarchy and Limits

Subagents can invoke their own subagents, enabling multiple layers of delegation and hierarchical team structures.
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated section titled "Delegation Hierarchy and Limits" describing how subagents can invoke their own subagents up to a maximum nesting depth of 10 levels. This is part of the Antigravity 2.0 (Google) Subagents documentation, directly substantiating the claim.
